title: dactylorhiza elata var. elongata
intro: Dactylorhiza elata var. elongata, also known as the tall marsh orchid or elongated marsh orchid, is a subspecies of the Dactylorhiza elata plant, belonging to the orchid family, native to Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza elata var. elongata include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or ointments for topical application.
